policy.notes: SAP MCP servers are executable dependencies. Use exact npm pins or documented source commits; no @latest or bare npx package specs.

@cap-js/mcp-server.trust: CAP model and documentation access; no tenant credentials in the bundled config.
@cap-js/mcp-server.scan: npm view @cap-js/mcp-server@0.0.5 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

@mariodefe/sap-datasphere-mcp.trust: Datasphere tenant access through OAuth environment variables; update only after explicit review.
@mariodefe/sap-datasphere-mcp.scan: npm view @mariodefe/sap-datasphere-mcp@1.2.1 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

@sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server.trust: Newest exact pin approved by maintainer request on 2026-06-14 despite the SAP 14-day cooldown default.
@sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server.scan: npm view @sap-ux/fiori-mcp-server@1.4.0 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

@ui5/mcp-server.trust: UI5 documentation, scaffolding, and lint tooling; no tenant credentials in the bundled config.
@ui5/mcp-server.scan: npm view @ui5/mcp-server@0.2.11 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

hana-mcp-server.trust: HANA database access through environment variables; update only after explicit review.
hana-mcp-server.scan: npm view hana-mcp-server@0.3.1 version dist.integrity && npm audit --package-lock-only

plugins/sap-sac-scripting/.mcp.json:sac-.trust: Trusted secondsky fork source install. This MCP uses SAC OAuth credentials and exposes read/write SAC REST API tools.
plugins/sap-sac-scripting/.mcp.json:sac-.scan: git -C "$SAC_MCP_PATH" rev-parse HEAD && npm --prefix "$SAC_MCP_PATH" ci --ignore-scripts && npm --prefix "$SAC_MCP_PATH" audit
